reference: My eight-year-old grandson is having fairly severe pain in his left abdomen. My email is yyyy@yyyy. Sorry, I just noticed I have to pay to get information. I tried on the WebMD page to describe the area, but it wouldn't let me, and then it gave distorted answers that you can read. No worries, I might need to take him to the hospital if this heating pad doesn't help.
